nasb.text: If the thief is not caught, then the owner of the house shall appear before the judges, to determine whether he laid his hands on his neighbor’s property.

esv.text: If the thief is not found, the owner of the house shall come near to God to show whether or not he has put his hand to his neighbor’s property.

cnv.text: 如果找不到竊賊，那家主必要到審判官那裡，查明他有沒有下手拿去鄰舍的財物。

ccb.text: 倘若没捉到盗贼，邻居就要到审判官那里证明自己没有偷拿。
